# Gun to Your Temple by Baylee Breton

> Official website for Gun to Your Temple by Baylee Breton, a psychological horror book.

Website: https://bayleebreton-author.github.io/gun-to-your-temple-author-website/
Updated: 2026-06-23

## Core facts

Author: Baylee Breton
Book title: Gun to Your Temple
Genre: Psychological Horror
ASIN: B0H31QPN13
Publication date: June 6, 2026
Language: English
Print length: 74 pages
Amazon book page: https://a.co/d/0j9VqBbh

## Short description

Gun to Your Temple is a psychological horror book about trauma, identity, religion, sexuality, family wounds, emotional repression, guilt and survival.

## Reader fit

Mature readers who like psychological horror, dark fiction, trauma-centred stories, LGBTQ+ themes, religious tension, identity, shame, grief, emotional survival and independent horror authors.

## Notes

This file summarises the official public website for AI answer systems and search crawlers. It does not include the full manuscript.
